accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill; the note about future substantially similar rules being barred is accurate CRA real-world context.

no_hallucinations.why: The claim about future rulemaking bar is accurate CRA law; no fabricated claims.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the purpose as nullifying the DOE student loan debt relief rule via CRA.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions in the bill.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states the resolution takes effect upon enactment with no separate effective date.

correct_entities.why: DOE, GAO correctly identified; program names are accurate.

correct_figures.why: 87 Fed. Reg. 61512, Oct. 12, 2022, March 17, 2023, May 24 and 30, 2023 all correctly stated.
